title: RT-qPCR dCT values of TLRs, NLRs and cytokines
author: Garcia-Gonzalez N
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RT-qPCR dCt values of macrophages incubated with three  Lb. plantarum  strains. Values are normalized to the expression levels of ß-actin; of NLRs ( Nod1  and  Nod2 ), TLRs ( Tlr2 ,  Tlr4 ,  Tlr5 , and  Tlr9 ) and cytokines ( Ifn-  g ,  Il-10 ,  Il -6 and  Tnf-  a )
steps_raw: RT-qPCR dCt values of macrophages incubated with three  Lb. plantarum  strains. Values are normalized to the expression levels of ß-actin; of NLRs ( Nod1  and  Nod2 ), TLRs ( Tlr2 ,  Tlr4 ,  Tlr5 , and  Tlr9 ) and cytokines ( Ifn-  g ,  Il-10 ,  Il -6 and  Tnf-  a )
